$comment: Cross-language contract guard (issue #204). The SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for
which CommandErrorCode the Worker's instancemanager emits per command kind
and instance precondition. Two table-driven tests pin to this file:
- worker: worker/internal/application/instancemanager/contract_test.go
drives the instancemanager into each precondition and asserts the
emitted code equals 'code' below.
- api: api/tests/servers/test_command_error_contract.py asserts every
(kind, CommandStatus) the API's convergence/special-case logic matches
on appears here -- so an API match on a (kind, code) the Worker never
emits FAILS that test (the #202 incident).
Rows mirror worker/internal/application/instancemanager/instancemanager.go.
'kind' is the Worker command kind (Handle's switch). 'code' is the wire
CommandErrorCode name (CONTROL_PLANE.md Section 7); 'ok' means success.
Preconditions:
instance_running   - a tracked running instance exists for the server id
instance_stopped   - no tracked instance and no orphan for the id
instance_absent    - the server id is unknown to this Worker
orphan_pending     - a failed-stop orphan is recorded (issue #251/#253)
driver_unavailable - the requested driver is not offered by this Worker
missing_path       - the file/dir target does not exist in the working set
unsafe_path        - a traversal-rejected path (FR-FILE-4)
